rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VIRGIA M. BERRY, AKA VIRGIA MAE BERRY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer Of Willie A. Davis To Petition Of Lee Arthur Mcglothin To Revoke Probate Of Will And To Each Other Cause Of Action Therein Alleged
rulings.Rulings: 1st cause of action to revoke probate of will and 4th cause of action for elder abuse. Tentative ruling: Sustained with 10 days for leave to amend to state facts showing that Lee Arthur McGlothin is an interested person if decedent Berry's will that is before the Court for probate is revoked. 2nd cause of action to cancel deed and 3rd cause of action to quiet title. Tentative ruling: Overruled. There are no points and authorities in support of these cause of action.
